sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73022" key="o)ligoe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-έτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n73022.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of few years,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρόνος, ἄνθρωπος, οἶνος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
